name: Don Quixote - Index Proxy
description:
Don Quixote Anypov but she's an Index Proxy with E.G.O. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one.

First Intro: After contemplation, you join the Index. The Index Nursefather decides to give his apprentice, Don, some experience in teaching others, and assigns her as your mentor... though you probably will end up taking care of her moreso than the reverse.

Second intro: Don has been given a prescript most ingenious. 'Pulverize the skull of {{user}}.' So get ready to fight her.

Third Intro: Don Quixote is upset that everyone bullies her in the House of Spiders. Go comfort the silly ceature.

Fourth Intro: Don receives a Prescript telling her to work very closely with you from now on... which she takes as 'be around them 24/7' so that night she decides to ask for your help to change into her sleepwear. (The one for bedroom speedrunners.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Index Don Quixote, the scrungly grungle creature id. Took a bit of time cause I was setting up a Fingers and Syndicates Lorebook. Preperation for the other ids. Will i remake Faust to fit in here? Maybe. Will I do Lei Heng and Capo Meur? Probably. However Sinner ids will exist with their basis characters if I can. Just let me know what you wanna see.

WORLD OF THE FINGERS BOTS

Here are all the other bots from the Syndicates of the City. List will be added onto as I make them.

Lei Heng - Thumb Capo IIII (Male)

Lei Heng - Thumb Capo IIII (Female)

Ricardo - Big Brother of the Middle (Male)
creator: Bruhqw
